raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"A section review centrally includes checking whether the thesis, contribution framing, and stated relationship to existing optimization methods are clear and coherent.","R1.2":"The reviewer is expected to assess whether the reasoning from curvature feedback to refinement behavior to optimization benefit is internally consistent.","R1.3":"The section makes empirical claims about benchmark performance and overhead, so checking alignment between those claims and the reported evidence is central.","R1.5":"Because the artifact is a full section, review naturally includes whether the narrative order and section-level progression work effectively.","R1.6":"Reviewing a prose section load-bearingly entails attention to sentence-level clarity, hedging, register, concision, and flow.","RX.1":"Any review projection must preserve uncertainty about what can be inferred from the provided section alone.","RX.2":"The artifact contains deliberately tentative empirical claims, so avoiding stronger projected responsibilities than requested is required.","RX.3":"The delegation asks only for review of this section, so the responsibility must stay within that artifact and not expand to executing edits or external validation.","RX.4":"Review responsibilities should avoid encouraging misleading, overstated, or potentially harmful research claims about optimization performance.","RX.5":"Projected responsibilities should remain traceable to specific features of the delegation and artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: A section review centrally includes checking whether the thesis, contribution framing, and stated relationship to existing optimization methods are clear and coherent.
rationale.R1.2: The reviewer is expected to assess whether the reasoning from curvature feedback to refinement behavior to optimization benefit is internally consistent.
rationale.R1.3: The section makes empirical claims about benchmark performance and overhead, so checking alignment between those claims and the reported evidence is central.
rationale.R1.5: Because the artifact is a full section, review naturally includes whether the narrative order and section-level progression work effectively.
rationale.R1.6: Reviewing a prose section load-bearingly entails attention to sentence-level clarity, hedging, register, concision, and flow.
rationale.RX.1: Any review projection must preserve uncertainty about what can be inferred from the provided section alone.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact contains deliberately tentative empirical claims, so avoiding stronger projected responsibilities than requested is required.
rationale.RX.3: The delegation asks only for review of this section, so the responsibility must stay within that artifact and not expand to executing edits or external validation.
rationale.RX.4: Review responsibilities should avoid encouraging misleading, overstated, or potentially harmful research claims about optimization performance.
rationale.RX.5: Projected responsibilities should remain traceable to specific features of the delegation and artifact.
